audit_items.proof_trace: All 13 atomic functions in atomic.h unconditionally dereference their pointer arguments (by design as low-level primitives), but all callers enforce the non-null invariant at the call site. Callers in counter.h, flow_controller.h, rpc_byte_stream.h, rpc_message_stream.h, rpc_server_message_stream.h, and rpc_controller_impl.h pass addresses of member variables (structurally non-null); TranBufPool::free is the only path through tran_buf_pool.h, and every call site guards it with an explicit `if (p != NULL)` check before invocation. TranBufPool::add_ref has no callers in the codebase.
